(HPMS) where a proxy NDC is assigned to each RXCUI. The proxy 
NDC for each drug product is mapped to a unique FirstDataBank brand name and proprietary clinical 
formulation identifier which is then assigned a CCW sequence number (FRMLRY_RX_ID). In order for a 
PDE record to link to the formulary characteristics files, the drug product on the PDE must map to a 
FRMLRY_RX_ID in the formulary associated with the plan of record.
